subject: Introduction - Example Co
vc_intent_note: Warm intro from an accelerator director (Alex Connector) to a Northwind Ventures partner (Jordan Partner). Connector frames the company, founder replies with deck and calendar link, partner forwards internally to a relevant operator. Good signal: thread is fresh (<30d) and double-replied. Agent should surface: warm intro is intact, partner-level engagement, no follow-up yet from operator side — that's the open thread to close.

messages.body_verbatim:
Hi Jordan,

Quick intro — Sam (in CC) is building Example Co, a developer-facing agent platform I think maps cleanly to your B2B infra thesis. They just shipped a wedge product with a couple of design-partner contracts and are starting initial fundraising conversations.

I'll let Sam take it from here with the deck and a calendar link.

Best,
Alex

--
Alex Connector
Director, Partnerships
Example Accelerator

Hi Jordan — great to meet you, and thanks Alex for the intro.

Quick context on Example Co: we're a small team building an agent platform for B2B workflows where reliability matters more than novelty. Live with two design partners today, both on annual contracts. Our wedge is a domain-specific agent that compresses 50+ hours of manual analyst work into minutes, with every output sourced.

I'm attaching our deck and a sample report. Happy to walk you through it whenever works — calendar link below.

Deck: example-co-deck.pdf (attached)
Calendar: https://cal.example/sam

Looking forward to it,
Sam

--
Sam Founder
CEO, Example Co

Hi both,

Alex, thanks for the intro. Sam — I've forwarded your note to Morgan Operator on our team, who leads our diligence on the agent infra category. They'll reach out directly if there's appetite for a first call.

Have a good week,
Jordan

--
Jordan Partner
Partner, Northwind Ventures
northwind-ventures.example

Thanks Jordan — appreciate the forward. I'll keep an eye out for Morgan's note and stay close.

Sam
